description_long: This handbag features a structured rectangular body with a roll-top closure, crafted primarily from smooth brown leather. The front and back panels are adorned with a woven textile insert displaying a geometric black and beige pattern, adding a touch of artisanal flair. A wide leather strap runs vertically over the top, securing the rolled closure and providing additional visual interest. The bag is equipped with a long, adjustable leather shoulder strap attached via gold-tone metal rings and a buckle, allowing for crossbody or shoulder wear. The overall design is both functional and stylish, suitable for urban environments. The combination of materials and patterns gives the bag a sophisticated yet casual appearance.
description: A brown leather roll-top handbag with a geometric patterned textile panel and an adjustable shoulder strap, accented by gold-tone hardware.
description_view_0: Front view shows the roll-top closure, wide vertical leather strap, and the geometric patterned textile panel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the rolled leather top and the attachment of the adjustable shoulder strap with gold hardware.
description_view_2: Back view displays the continuation of the geometric patterned textile and the clean, uninterrupted leather base.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the rolled closure, strap attachment, and the slim profile of the bag.
attribute_strap_type: Single long adjustable leather shoulder or crossbody strap, attached with gold-tone metal rings and buckle.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Roll-top closure secured by a wide vertical leather strap with a buckle at the front.
attribute_decorative_elements: Geometric patterned textile panel; gold-tone hardware.
attribute_pattern: Geometric black and beige woven pattern on the front and back textile panels.
